reference: Hi, you need not to worry at all. This is a normal occurrence. Since it is a boy, his voice will become thicker as he grows. In some babies, this occurs later, and in some earlier. I wish your child good health.
text: Hi, you need not to worry at all. This is a normal occurrence since it is a boy. His voice will become thicker as he grows. In some babies, this occurs later, and in some earlier. I wish your child good health.
